name: HMS Talent (iii) (P 337)
events: This page was last updated in November 2018.
25 Jul 1945 HMS Talent (Lt.Cdr. R.M. Favell, DSC, RN) departed from Barrow for Holy Loch. (1)
26 Jul 1945 HMS Talent (Lt.Cdr. R.M. Favell, DSC, RN) arrived at Holy Loch to begin a period of trials and training. (1)
27 Jul 1945 HMS Talent (Lt.Cdr. R.M. Favell, DSC, RN) conducted full speed trials on the measured mile. (2)
30 Jul 1945 HMS Talent (Lt.Cdr. R.M. Favell, DSC, RN) conducted gunnery trials in the Clyde area. (2)
31 Jul 1945 HMS Talent (Lt.Cdr. R.M. Favell, DSC, RN) conducted exercises in the Clyde area. (2)
1 Aug 1945 HMS Talent (Lt.Cdr. R.M. Favell, DSC, RN) conducted exercises in the Clyde area. (3)
3 Aug 1945 HMS Talent (Lt.Cdr. R.M. Favell, DSC, RN) conducted noise trials in Loch Goil. (3)
4 Aug 1945 HMS Talent (Lt.Cdr. R.M. Favell, DSC, RN) conducted trials in the Clyde area. (3)

5 Aug 1945 HMS Talent (Lt.Cdr. R.M. Favell, DSC, RN) and HMS Astute (A/Lt.Cdr. R. Gatehouse, DSC, RN) both conducted attack exercises in the Clyde area during which they served as targets for each other. (3)
7 Aug 1945 HMS Talent (Lt.Cdr. R.M. Favell, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises in the Clyde area together with HMS Brilliant (A/Cdr.(Retd.) A.R.W. Sayle, RD, RNR). These included night exercises. (3)
8 Aug 1945 HMS Talent (Lt.Cdr. R.M. Favell, DSC, RN) returned to Holy Loch upon completion of her exercises. (3)
9 Aug 1945 HMS Talent (Lt.Cdr. R.M. Favell, DSC, RN) conducted exercises in the Clyde area. (3)
11 Aug 1945 HMS Talent (Lt.Cdr. R.M. Favell, DSC, RN) shifted Holy Loch to the torpedo range at Arrochar, Loch Long, to conduct her torpedo discharge trials. (3)
12 Aug 1945 HMS Talent (Lt.Cdr. R.M. Favell, DSC, RN) conducted torpedo discharge trials off Arrochar. (3)
14 Aug 1945 HMS Talent (Lt.Cdr. R.M. Favell, DSC, RN) conducted torpedo discharge trials off Arrochar. (3)
15 Aug 1945 HMS Talent (Lt.Cdr. R.M. Favell, DSC, RN) conducted torpedo discharge trials off Arrochar. (3)
17 Aug 1945 HMS Talent (Lt.Cdr. R.M. Favell, DSC, RN) conducted torpedo discharge trials off Arrochar. (3)
18 Aug 1945 HMS Talent (Lt.Cdr. R.M. Favell, DSC, RN) conducted torpedo discharge trials off Arrochar. (3)
19 Aug 1945 HMS Talent (Lt.Cdr. R.M. Favell, DSC, RN) conducted torpedo discharge trials off Arrochar. (3)
20 Aug 1945 Having completed her torpedo discharge trials, HMS Talent (Lt.Cdr. R.M. Favell, DSC, RN), shifted from Arrochar to Holy Loch. (3)

24 Aug 1945 HMS Talent (Lt.Cdr. R.M. Favell, DSC, RN) conducted attack exercises in the Clyde area during which HMS Hastings (A/Cdr. E.A. Stocker, DSC, RN) served as target. These included night exercises. (3)
25 Aug 1945 HMS Talent (Lt.Cdr. R.M. Favell, DSC, RN) returned to Holy Loch upon completion of her exercises. (3)
27 Aug 1945 HMS Talent (Lt.Cdr. R.M. Favell, DSC, RN) conducted exercises in the Clyde area. Upon completion of these exercises HMS Talent proceeded to Campbeltown. (3)
28 Aug 1945 HMS Talent (Lt.Cdr. R.M. Favell, DSC, RN) conducted radar exercises in the Clyde area with HMS Hastings (A/Cdr. E.A. Stocker, DSC, RN) and HMS Springer (Lt. J.F. Michell, RN). (3)
29 Aug 1945 HMS Talent (Lt.Cdr. R.M. Favell, DSC, RN) conducted exercises off Campbeltown. She also carried out S.T.U. (mine detection) trials. (3)
30 Aug 1945 HMS Talent (Lt.Cdr. R.M. Favell, DSC, RN) conducted exercises off Campbeltown. Upon completion of these exercises HMS Talent proceeded to Holy Loch.
[HMS Talent continued her exercises programme in the Clyde area before being sent to the Far East.]
27 Oct 1945 HMS Talent (Lt.Cdr. R.M. Favell, DSC, RN) departed from Holy Loch for Gibraltar. She is to proceed to the Far East. (1)
2 Nov 1945 HMS Talent (Lt.Cdr. R.M. Favell, DSC, RN) arrived at Gibraltar. (1)
2 Nov 1945 HMS Talent (Lt.Cdr. R.M. Favell, DSC, RN) departed from Gibraltar for Malta. (1)
7 Nov 1945 HMS Talent (Lt.Cdr. R.M. Favell, DSC, RN) arrived at Malta. (1)
14 Nov 1945 HMS Talent (Lt.Cdr. R.M. Favell, DSC, RN) departed from Malta for Port Said. (1)
18 Nov 1945 HMS Talent (Lt.Cdr. R.M. Favell, DSC, RN) arrived at Port Said. (1)
20 Nov 1945 HMS Talent (Lt.Cdr. R.M. Favell, DSC, RN) departed from Port Said and transits the Suez Canal. She then departed from Suez bound for Aden. (1)
25 Nov 1945 HMS Talent (Lt.Cdr. R.M. Favell, DSC, RN) arrived at Aden. She departed from for Colombo later the same day. (1)
3 Dec 1945 HMS Talent (Lt.Cdr. R.M. Favell, DSC, RN) arrived at Colombo. (1)
9 Dec 1945 HMS Talent (Lt.Cdr. R.M. Favell, DSC, RN) departed from Colombo for Hong Kong. (1)
